results.title: Maharaja Trophy KSCA T20: Mysore Warriors edge Coastal Kings Mangaluru in last-ball thriller
results.description: Hubballi, July 1 (IANS) Mysore Warriors held their nerve in a thrilling finish to defeat Coastal Kings Mangaluru by two wickets off the final ball in the Maharaja Trophy KSCA T20 tournament in Hubballi on Tuesday. Needing seven runs from the final over, tail-end batter and wicketkeeper Yuvraj Arora produced a sensational finish, smashing an ...

results.title: USMNT aiming for historic win vs. Bosnia and Herzegovina
results.description: The U.S. Men's National Team haven't won a World Cup knockout match since 2002 nor have they defeated a European side in any competition in more than five years.
